content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/click/types.py,src/click/core.py
note: Finished dynamic default resolution. Touched: Option.__init__ (added self._dynamic_default detection/validation right after super().__init__ call, before your 'if prompt is True' block), new Option.resolve_dynamic_default() method (inserted after get_error_hint), Command.parse_args (added second-pass loop after the main per-param loop, before the extra-args check), and Option.get_help_extra (extended the show_default condition + added an elif branch for '(dynamic)'). In types.py: extended convert_type() to infer element type from dynamic-default mappings instead of falling back to STRING. Ran full test suite (739 passed) with both our changes combined - no collisions, test_info_dict.py also green. All yours/mine boundaries held.
